title: alphonsea lutea
intro: Alphonsea lutea, also known as the Yellow Alphonsea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its seeds and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alphonsea lutea include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Alphonsea lutea can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
